OmniUiCard.description: Parent Card to display Clinician's Photo, Name, Status, Title, Contact Information, IDs along with related Active Healthcare Practitioner Facilities and Healthcare Provider Specialties.
OmniUiCard.name: ClinicianCardParent
OmniUiCard.propertySetConfig:
